title: Register a new account and land on dashboard
description: Verifies a new user can register with valid details and is redirected to the dashboard on success.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill New User into the full name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a password with at least 8 characters into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Register and land on dashboard with seeded categories
description: Verifies a new visitor can register and reach the dashboard with job category options available when creating the first job.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a new email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Click the control to add a new job entry from the dashboard
Click the category dropdown
Verify the category dropdown shows selectable default categories

title: Login and land on dashboard
description: Verifies a returning user can log in with valid credentials and reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Create first job and see it reflected on dashboard and work log
description: Verifies a freelancer can create a first job and the dashboard monthly totals and recent jobs, plus the work log list, reflect the new entry.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the control to add a new job entry from the dashboard
Fill Freelance Client A into the client name field
Fill Project Alpha into the project name field
Select a valid start date into the start date field
Select a valid deadline date after the start date into the deadline date field
Select a category from the category dropdown
Select a status value for the job
Enter 1000 into the contract amount field
Save the new job entry
Verify the dashboard shows the new job in the recent jobs list
Click the navigation item to open the work log
Verify the work log list includes the newly created job

title: Filter jobs by month, category, and status
description: Verifies the work log filters narrow the visible job rows to match the selected month, category, and status.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the work log
Click the control to create a new work log entry
Fill Filter Client into the client name field
Fill Filter Project into the project name field
Select a category from the category dropdown
Select a status value for the job
Select a valid start date into the start date field
Save the new job entry
Select the month that includes the created job in the month filter
Select the created job's category in the category filter
Select the created job's status in the status filter
Verify the work log list shows the created job under the selected filters

title: Search clients by name
description: Verifies a freelancer can search the client directory by name and see the client list filtered to matching results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the client directory
Fill a unique client name string into the client search field
Verify the client list updates to show only clients matching the search term

title: Inline update job status from the work log table
description: Verifies a freelancer can change a job’s status inline in the work log and the updated status is shown on the row.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the work log
Click the control to create a new work log entry
Fill Status Client into the client name field
Fill Status Project into the project name field
Select a status value for the job
Save the new job entry
Change the job status using the status control in the job row
Verify the job row shows the newly selected status

title: Edit a job via modal and see updates in the list
description: Verifies editing a job from the work log modal persists changes and the work log row reflects the update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the work log
Click the control to create a new work log entry
Fill Edit Client into the client name field
Fill Edit Project into the project name field
Enter 200 into the contract amount field
Save the new job entry
Open the edit modal for the created job row
Fill Edit Project Updated into the project name field
Save changes in the edit modal
Verify the work log list shows the job with the updated project name

title: View aggregated revenue and job counts per client
description: Verifies creating multiple jobs for the same client results in an aggregated client entry with correct job count and revenue summary displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the new work log entry form
Fill Client Alpha into the client name field
Fill a valid job title into the job title field
Fill 1000 into the job amount field
Submit the new job form
Click the navigation link to open the new work log entry form
Fill Client Alpha into the client name field
Fill a valid job title into the job title field
Fill 500 into the job amount field
Submit the new job form
Click the navigation link to open the client directory
Fill Client Alpha into the client search field
Verify the client row shows a job count of 2
Verify the client row shows an aggregated revenue total matching the two created jobs

title: Delete a job with confirmation and remove it from the list
description: Verifies deleting a job from the work log with confirmation removes the row from the job list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the work log
Click the control to create a new work log entry
Fill Delete Client into the client name field
Fill Delete Project into the project name field
Save the new job entry
Initiate delete for the created job row
Confirm the deletion
Verify the deleted job no longer appears in the work log list

title: Export clients CSV from directory
description: Verifies a user can export client data as CSV and the browser downloads a CSV file from the client directory.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the client directory
Click the export clients CSV action
Verify a CSV file download is initiated

title: Export jobs as CSV from work log
description: Verifies a freelancer can export job data from the work log and a CSV download is initiated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the work log
Click the control to create a new work log entry
Fill Export Client into the client name field
Fill Export Project into the project name field
Enter 300 into the contract amount field
Save the new job entry
Trigger the CSV export from the work log
Verify a CSV file download is initiated

title: Save updated profile and business settings
description: Verifies a freelancer can update settings fields and save, and the updated information persists on the settings page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open settings
Fill Test User Settings into the full name field
Fill Test Studio LLC into the company name field
Fill TAX-12345 into the tax ID field
Fill 123 Test Street into the business address field
Select USD as the default currency
Submit the settings save action
Wait for the save to complete
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the settings page displays the updated profile and business information

title: Navigate from landing page to registration
description: Verifies a visitor can start signup from the landing page and reach the registration page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary call-to-action to get started
Verify the registration page is displayed

title: Discard new job draft without creating a record
description: Verifies that discarding a partially filled new job form returns to the work log and does not create a job entry.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the work log
Click the control to create a new work log entry
Fill Throwaway Client into the client name field
Fill Temporary Project into the project name field
Discard the draft job entry
Verify the work log list does not include a job for Throwaway Client

title: Toggle currency display affects client amounts
description: Verifies switching the currency toggle updates displayed client revenue amounts consistently across the client directory view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the new work log entry form
Fill Client Currency into the client name field
Fill a valid job title into the job title field
Fill 15745 into the job amount field
Submit the new job form
Click the navigation link to open the client directory
Fill Client Currency into the client search field
Select USD in the currency toggle
Verify the client revenue amount is displayed in USD
Select IDR in the currency toggle
Verify the client revenue amount is displayed in IDR

title: Client name required when creating a job
description: Verifies the new job form blocks saving when the required client name is missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard/work-log/new
Fill Project Without Client into the project name field
Enter 500 into the contract amount field
Save the new job entry
Verify a required-field validation error is visible for the client name

title: Paginate through client list
description: Verifies a user can navigate client directory pagination controls and see different client rows on subsequent pages.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the new work log entry form
Fill Client Page A into the client name field
Fill a valid job title into the job title field
Fill 10 into the job amount field
Submit the new job form
Click the navigation link to open the new work log entry form
Fill Client Page B into the client name field
Fill a valid job title into the job title field
Fill 20 into the job amount field
Submit the new job form
Click the navigation link to open the client directory
Click the pagination control to go to the next page
Verify a different set of client rows is displayed after pagination

title: Paginate through work log results
description: Verifies a freelancer can use pagination controls in the work log to navigate between pages of job rows.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to open the work log
Use pagination controls to navigate to the next page of results
Verify a different page of job rows is displayed

title: Discard unsaved settings changes
description: Verifies a freelancer can discard edits in settings and the original values remain unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open settings
Fill Temp Name Change into the full name field
Fill Temp Company Change into the company name field
Click the discard changes action
Verify the settings fields revert to their previously saved values

title: Upgrade to Pro updates plan status
description: Verifies a free-tier user can complete the simulated upgrade and see plan status updated to Pro in settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open settings
Click the upgrade to Pro action
Confirm the upgrade in the upgrade confirmation UI
Verify the plan status is shown as Pro

title: Navigate from landing page to login
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate from the landing page to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to log in
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Default currency selection persists across reload
description: Verifies changing the default currency in settings persists when revisiting settings within the same session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open settings
Select IDR as the default currency
Submit the settings save action
Wait for the save to complete
Click the navigation link to open the dashboard
Click the navigation link to open settings
Verify the default currency selection remains set to IDR

title: Registration rejects short password
description: Verifies registration blocks passwords shorter than the minimum and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill New User into the full name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a password shorter than 8 characters into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Client directory empty state when no jobs exist
description: Verifies the client directory shows an empty state when the user has no jobs and therefore no derived clients.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the work log
Delete all jobs shown in the work log using the row delete action and confirmation
Click the navigation link to open the client directory
Verify an empty state is displayed indicating there are no clients

title: View Pro pricing/features section from landing page
description: Verifies a visitor can jump to the pricing section and see the pricing comparison content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to see Pro features/pricing
Verify the pricing comparison section is displayed

title: Expand and collapse an FAQ item
description: Verifies a visitor can expand an FAQ accordion item to view its answer content and collapse it again.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the FAQ section
Click an FAQ accordion item to expand it
Click the same FAQ accordion item to collapse it
Verify the FAQ answer content is not displayed for that item
